---
title: "About me"
about:
  template: marquee
  image-width: 9em
  image-shape: round
date-modified: last-modified
image: "https://github.com/i9wa4.png"
toc: false
---

```{.yaml}
profile:
  name: uma-chan

  organizations:
    - name: GENDA Inc.
      roles:
        - Data Engineer
        - MLOps Engineer

    - name: PIVOT, Inc.
      roles:
        - Data Engineer

  passions:
    - Vim
    - tmux
    - Databricks
```

[![3-stats](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/i9wa4/i9wa4.github.io/gh-summary/transparent/3-stats.svg)](https://github.com/vn7n24fzkq/github-profile-summary-cards)[![1-repos-per-language](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/i9wa4/i9wa4.github.io/gh-summary/transparent/1-repos-per-language.svg)](https://github.com/vn7n24fzkq/github-profile-summary-cards)

<div align="left">
  <a href="https://github.com/antonkomarev/github-profile-views-counter">
    <img src="https://komarev.com/ghpvc/?username=i9wa4&label=GitHub_Profile_Views&style=flat"/>
  </a>
</div>
